aria_current.notes: LocaleToggle.tsx uses spread-conditional `{...(ptIsActive ? { 'aria-current': 'page' as const } : {})}` on each <Link>. Idiomatic React: empty-object spread on the inactive side is a no-op, so the attribute is only emitted on the active side. Since `locale` is hardcoded per route (PT page passes 'pt', EN page passes 'en'), `ptIsActive` and `enIsActive` are mutually exclusive at SSR time — exactly one Link emits the attribute. No aria-pressed residue. `as const` narrows the value to the literal 'page' type, matching WAI-ARIA 1.2's same-page-indicator contract. Scene-4 unmount (return null) preserved.

i18n_copy.notes: pt.ts line 16: messageMarker: 'Uma mensagem da Terra' — sentence case, matches the comment header at lines 6-11 which documents strings are stored normal-case and the component applies uppercase via Tailwind. GalaxyHeadline.tsx line 17 applies `uppercase` on the marker span. Contract honored.

carousel_repos_helper.notes: Placement at src/lib/home/carousel-repos.ts is correct per project convention (lib/<feature>/<module>). CAROUSEL_REPO_ORDER declared `as const` so the tuple retains readonly literal types ['proposal-ai','task-agent','doctalk']; downstream `.in(..., CAROUSEL_REPO_ORDER as unknown as string[])` widens only at the Supabase call site, preserving the narrow literal elsewhere. No circular import: helper imports CarouselRepo type from @/components/space/ProjectsCarousel; grep of src/components for '@/lib/home' returned zero hits, so ProjectsCarousel (and its transitive imports) never depend on the helper. Error path logs structured code without echoing error.message.

narrowed_props.notes: `{ label: string }` naming is appropriate. Each component renders exactly one localized visible string; `label` is the natural name for 'the one displayed word/phrase' and is already reused by MessageMarker in GalaxyHeadline. If either component grows to carry more strings later, the prop would naturally become a dict slice again — the current narrow shape is right-sized for today's surface.

deletions.notes: Grepped src/ for word-boundary symbols \bIndexRow\b, \bProjectIndex\b, \bSiteHeader\b, \bSiteFooter\b. ProjectIndex and SiteFooter: zero hits. IndexRow: 2 hits in JSDoc comments only (AdminRepoRow.tsx line 30, safe-url.ts line 6) — historical context, no import or JSX usage. SiteHeader: 2 hits in JSDoc only (ScrollSentinel.tsx line 16, AdminHeader.tsx lines 10/17) — historical context. No live references; deletions safe.

regression_guard.notes: Confirmed no regressions of the prior-cycle finding classes: (a) no hardcoded PT/EN strings in page.tsx or en/page.tsx JSX — every visible string flows from dict.*; (b) BackLink/ContactLink now take narrow { label: string } rather than Dictionary['contact'] slice, matching the adjust's intent to reduce over-broad prop scope; (c) description_ai only appears once in src/lib/sync/sync.ts as intentional historical JSDoc (per QA handoff), not stale usage.
